# chunk_top_level_type_index

| Source type / method | Source location | KSY type / field | KSY location | Resolved |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `ChunkTopLevel.save` | `input/ChunkTopLevel.java` | root | `output/chunk_top_level.ksy` | Partial (Top-level Only) |
| `ChunkTopLevel.Square.save` / `ChunkTopLevel.Square.load` | `input/ChunkTopLevel.java` | `types.square` | `output/chunk_top_level.ksy` | No |
| `Polygon.save` / `Polygon.load` | `input/Polygon.java` | `types.polygon` | `output/polygon.ksy` | No |
